name: Over the Adelaide Hills
description: Rough start with a tough climb out of Adelaide, with my panier straps almost immediately snapping.  Thank you to Darcy and Charlie for the help, and the smooth glide into Langhornes Creek, that left me the energy to fight the wind into Wellington.
